name: ET Prime Annual Membership
description: Unlimited access to ET Prime's exclusive library — 20+ sector deep-dives, 4,000+ stock reports, the digital edition of The Economic Times, member-only newsletters, and invitations to virtual events with industry leaders. The definitive subscription for serious investors and business professionals.

name: ET Prime Monthly Plan
description: Month-to-month access to ET Prime without annual commitment. Ideal for professionals who want flexibility — full access to exclusive stories, sector analysis, stock reports, and the digital newspaper edition.

name: ET Prime + Markets Pro Bundle
description: The ultimate combo for active investors — combines ET Prime's research depth with ET Markets Pro's real-time tools. Get exclusive articles, stock screeners, portfolio analytics, and market alerts in one subscription at 30% savings.

name: ET Digital Pass
description: Affordable entry point into the ET ecosystem. Access to the digital newspaper edition, curated daily briefings, and limited premium articles. Perfect for readers who want quality journalism without the full premium commitment.

name: ET Prime Corporate — Team License
description: Enterprise-grade access for teams of 5 or more. Bulk pricing, centralised billing, and admin controls. Equip your leadership team, research analysts, and strategy leads with real-time business intelligence from India's most trusted source.

name: ET Prime Student Plan
description: 70% discounted ET Prime for verified college students. Build your business IQ early — access exclusive sector reports, startup stories, and financial literacy content. Valid student ID required.

name: Times Prime Membership (includes ET Prime)
description: Times Prime bundles ET Prime with 30+ premium subscriptions — Swiggy One, MakeMyTrip, Pharmeasy, Gaana Plus, and more. One membership, dozens of benefits across food, travel, entertainment, and business news.

name: ET Prime Gift Subscription
description: Gift a year of ET Prime to a colleague, mentee, or family member. Includes a personalised digital gift card and instant activation. The gift that builds careers and portfolios.

name: ET Morning Brief
description: Start your day with the 10 stories that matter most. Delivered at 7 AM IST, the Morning Brief distils overnight global markets, policy moves, and corporate action into a crisp 5-minute read curated by ET's senior editors.

name: ET Market Watch
description: End-of-day market analysis delivered at 5 PM IST. Covers Nifty/Sensex movements, top gainers and losers, FII/DII flows, sectoral analysis, and what to watch for tomorrow. Essential for active market participants.

name: CEO Daily by ET
description: Curated for CXOs and senior leaders. A weekly deep-dive into boardroom moves, M&A activity, leadership transitions, regulatory changes, and strategic pivots shaping India Inc. Exclusive interviews and commentary from ET's corner-office beat.

name: ET Sector Spotlight
description: Each week, a single sector under the microscope — IT, pharma, BFSI, real estate, auto, FMCG, and more. Covers earnings trends, competitive dynamics, regulatory headwinds, and investment thesis. A must for sectoral investors.

name: ET IPO Watch
description: Never miss an IPO window again. Covers upcoming mainboard and SME IPOs, grey market premiums, subscription status, analyst verdicts, and post-listing performance tracking. Sent every Monday and on IPO open days.

name: ET Personal Finance Weekly
description: Practical money management advice for salaried professionals. Covers tax-saving strategies, mutual fund picks, insurance reviews, loan rate comparisons, and retirement planning tips. Every Saturday morning.

name: ET Tech Pulse
description: India's tech and startup ecosystem in one newsletter. Covers funding rounds, Big Tech earnings, AI developments, SaaS metrics, fintech regulation, and the people driving India's digital transformation. Every Wednesday.

name: ET Global Markets Roundup
description: A Sunday evening read that prepares you for the week ahead. Covers Wall Street, European markets, Asian bourses, commodity prices, crude oil, gold, and crypto — with implications for Indian markets highlighted.

name: ET Markets Pro
description: Professional-grade market dashboard with real-time BSE/NSE feeds, advanced charting, multi-timeframe analysis, and customisable watchlists. Includes pre-market heatmaps, bulk/block deal alerts, and delivery volume analysis.

name: Stock Reports Plus
description: AI-powered stock research reports covering 4,000+ BSE/NSE stocks. Each report scores a stock on 5 pillars — earnings, valuation, technicals, peer comparison, and analyst consensus. Updated daily after market close.

name: ET Stock Screener
description: Filter the entire BSE/NSE universe using 50+ fundamental and technical parameters — PE ratio, ROE, debt-to-equity, moving averages, RSI, delivery volume, and more. Save custom screens and set alerts.

name: Big Bull Portfolio Tracker
description: Track the public portfolio holdings of India's marquee investors — Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Trust, Dolly Khanna, Vijay Kedia, Ashish Kacholia, and 20+ others. See quarterly changes, new entries, exits, and position sizing.

name: ET Market Mood Index
description: Proprietary sentiment gauge combining options data, VIX, FII flows, advance-decline ratio, and retail participation metrics into a single fear-greed score. Helps time entry and exit decisions based on crowd psychology.

name: ET Mutual Fund Research Tool
description: Compare 5,000+ mutual fund schemes across AUM, expense ratio, rolling returns, risk-adjusted performance (Sharpe/Sortino), and portfolio overlap. SIP return calculator and tax-efficient switching recommendations.

name: ET Commodity Tracker
description: Live prices for gold, silver, crude oil, natural gas, copper, and agricultural commodities on MCX and NCDEX. Includes global benchmark comparison (COMEX, LME), seasonal trend charts, and import-export duty impact analysis.

name: ET Forex Dashboard
description: Real-time USD/INR, EUR/INR, GBP/INR, and 20+ currency pair rates with RBI reference rates, NDF market premiums, and forward curve data. Essential for importers, exporters, and forex traders.

name: ET Portfolio Analyser
description: Upload or manually enter your stock/MF portfolio and get instant analysis — asset allocation breakdown, sector concentration risk, Nifty correlation, dividend yield, and rebalancing suggestions powered by quantitative models.

name: ET IPO Tracker
description: Complete IPO lifecycle tracking — from DRHP filings to listing day performance. Covers mainboard and SME IPOs with grey market premium updates, subscription data (QIB/HNI/Retail split), allotment status, and post-listing returns tracker.

name: ET Masterclass: Investing 101 — Building Your First Portfolio
description: A comprehensive beginner's course covering equity, mutual funds, bonds, and gold. Learn how to set financial goals, assess risk tolerance, build a diversified portfolio, and avoid common beginner mistakes. Taught by SEBI-registered investment advisor Deepak Shenoy.

name: ET Masterclass: Options Trading Strategies for Intermediate Traders
description: Go beyond buying calls and puts. Learn iron condors, straddles, bull/bear spreads, and weekly expiry strategies with real P&L case studies from Nifty and Bank Nifty. Includes a live market demo session.

name: ET Masterclass: Personal Finance for Salaried Professionals
description: Turn your salary into wealth. Covers budgeting frameworks, emergency funds, tax-saving under old and new regime, optimal insurance coverage, SIP vs lump sum, and retirement corpus calculation. Practical, no-jargon approach.

details.instructor: Monika Halan, Author of 'Let's Talk Money'

name: ET Masterclass: AI for Business Leaders
description: Understand GenAI, LLMs, and automation without writing a single line of code. Learn to evaluate AI use cases, assess ROI, manage AI teams, and navigate ethical considerations. Case studies from Indian enterprises.

details.instructor: Anurag Jain, AI Advisor to Fortune 500

name: ET Masterclass: Technical Analysis — Charts, Patterns & Indicators
description: Master candlestick patterns, support/resistance, moving averages, RSI, MACD, and Fibonacci retracements. Build your own trading system with entry/exit rules. Practise on live Nifty and Bank Nifty charts.

name: ET Masterclass: Mutual Fund Selection & SIP Maximisation
description: Learn to pick the right mutual fund from 5,000+ schemes. Covers direct vs regular, expense ratios, rolling returns vs point-to-point, portfolio overlap analysis, and SIP step-up strategies for wealth compounding.

name: ET Masterclass: Tax Planning Workshop — FY 2026-27
description: Navigate the new vs old tax regime, maximise Section 80C/80D deductions, understand LTCG/STCG changes, and structure HRA/NPS for optimal savings. Live Q&A with a chartered accountant. Updated for Budget 2026.

name: ET Masterclass: Real Estate Investment — Beyond Your First Home
description: Evaluate rental yield vs capital appreciation, understand REITs, navigate RERA, and build a real estate portfolio alongside equities. Covers commercial, residential, and fractional ownership models.

name: ET Masterclass: Cryptocurrency & Digital Assets Fundamentals
description: Demystify Bitcoin, Ethereum, and the broader crypto ecosystem. Understand blockchain technology, DeFi protocols, NFT valuations, India's crypto tax framework, and responsible allocation within a traditional portfolio.

name: ET Masterclass: Leadership in Volatile Markets
description: How top CEOs lead through uncertainty — recessions, market crashes, geopolitical disruptions. Real-world case studies from 2008 GFC, COVID-19, and the Russia-Ukraine disruption. Build your crisis leadership playbook.

details.instructor: D. Shivakumar, Group President Aditya Birla

name: ET Masterclass: ESG Investing — The Sustainability Premium
description: Understand ESG scoring frameworks, BRSR compliance, green bonds, and how sustainability metrics impact long-term stock returns. Learn to screen Indian companies on ESG parameters and build a responsible portfolio.

name: ET Masterclass: Retirement Planning — The ₹5 Crore Playbook
description: Calculate your retirement corpus, build a withdrawal strategy, optimise NPS + PPF + EPF stack, understand annuity products, and plan for healthcare costs in retirement. Designed for 35–50 year olds who are serious about retiring on their terms.

name: ET Masterclass: Startup Fundraising — From Seed to Series B
description: Learn to build a pitch deck, model unit economics, negotiate term sheets, choose the right investor, and manage cap tables. Taught by a VC partner with case studies from Zerodha, Razorpay, and Meesho.

name: ET Masterclass: Financial Modelling in Excel
description: Build 3-statement models, DCF valuations, and LBO analyses from scratch in Excel. Master keyboard shortcuts, dynamic charts, and scenario analysis tables used by investment bankers and equity research analysts.

name: ET Masterclass: Behavioural Finance — Why Smart People Make Bad Money Decisions
description: Explore cognitive biases that destroy portfolio returns — anchoring, loss aversion, herd mentality, recency bias, and overconfidence. Build a personal checklist to make rational investment decisions under pressure.

name: ET Wealth Summit 2026
description: India's premier wealth creation conference. Top fund managers, SEBI officials, and economic thought leaders discuss market outlook, asset allocation strategies, and emerging investment themes for FY27. Exclusive networking dinner with speakers.

name: ET Global Business Summit 2026
description: Two-day flagship summit bringing together 100+ global and Indian business leaders, policymakers, and economists. Keynotes on India's growth trajectory, geopolitical risks, trade realignment, and the future of work. Live-streamed with ET Prime virtual pass.

name: ET Entrepreneur Summit 2026
description: Where founders meet funders. Pitch competitions, VC panels, founder fireside chats, and a startup expo hall. Covers seed-to-IPO journeys, fundraising strategies, and scaling challenges unique to India. Afterparty networking included.

name: India Financial Summit 2026
description: Macroeconomic outlook, banking sector health, NBFC growth, digital payments evolution, and financial inclusion roadmap. Keynotes from RBI, SEBI, and IRDAI leadership. Closed-door roundtables on credit policy and regulatory reform.

name: ET CXO Roundtable: AI & Business Transformation
description: Intimate 50-person roundtable for CIOs and CTOs. No keynotes — structured peer discussions on AI implementation challenges, vendor selection, talent gaps, and measuring AI ROI. Chatham House rules. Dinner included.

name: ET Women Leaders Forum 2026
description: Celebrating and amplifying women in Indian business. Panels on breaking the glass ceiling, boardroom diversity, women-led startups, and work-life integration. Awards ceremony for ET Businesswoman of the Year.

name: ET Awards for Corporate Excellence 2026
description: ET's most prestigious annual awards recognising outstanding corporate performance, governance, and innovation. Categories include Company of the Year, CEO of the Year, Emerging Company, and Lifetime Achievement.

name: ET Startup Awards 2026
description: Awards celebrating India's most innovative startups across categories — Fintech, SaaS, D2C, DeepTech, HealthTech, and Bootstrap Champion. Features a pitch stage for shortlisted startups and VC speed-dating sessions.

name: ET Marketing & Advertising Summit
description: India's top CMOs discuss brand building in the AI era — performance marketing ROI, content commerce, influencer economics, and privacy-first advertising. Includes the ET Brand Equity quiz finals.

name: ET HR World Congress 2026
description: The future of work — AI in recruitment, hybrid workforce management, employee wellness ROI, ESOP structuring, and DEI measurement. CHROs from top 50 Indian companies share playbooks and data.

speakers: CHROs from TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HUL

name: ET Infrastructure Summit 2026
description: India's $1.3 trillion infrastructure push under the microscope — highways, railways, smart cities, green energy, and real estate. Policy deep-dives with NHAI, Railway Board, and Smart Cities Mission officials.

name: ET Tech Leaders Conclave 2026
description: India's top technology executives discuss AI strategy, cloud migration, cybersecurity, and India's position as a global tech talent hub. Includes startup demo zone and VC office hours.

name: ET Banking & Finance Summit 2026
description: Deep-dive into India's banking transformation — digital lending regulations, CBDC roadmap, co-lending models, NPA resolution progress, and fintech-bank partnerships. Intimate format with regulator access.

name: ET Real Estate Forum 2026
description: Luxury real estate boom, affordable housing policy, REIT performance, co-living/co-working trends, and NRI investment flows. Developer panels, architect showcases, and a property expo with on-site booking.

name: ET SME Growth Summit 2026
description: Designed for small and medium business owners. Covers GST compliance, access to credit, digital transformation on a budget, export opportunities, and government schemes. Free mentoring sessions with MSME ministry officials.

name: HDFC Infinia Credit Card
description: India's most aspirational credit card — 5X reward points on all spends, complimentary domestic and international lounge access, global travel insurance, and milestone benefits. Invitation-only for high-income earners.

name: SBI SimplyCLICK Credit Card
description: Designed for online spenders — 10X rewards on Amazon, Cleartrip, Apollo 24|7 and other partner platforms. ₹500 Amazon voucher as welcome gift. No annual fee for first year, waived on ₹1L annual spend.

name: ICICI Prudential iProtect Smart — Term Insurance
description: Pure term life insurance with ₹1 crore cover starting at ₹490/month for a 30-year-old non-smoker. Optional critical illness, accidental death, and income benefit riders. 98.6% claim settlement ratio.

name: HDFC Life Click 2 Protect Life — Term Plan
description: Comprehensive term plan with life cover up to ₹10 crore. Flexible payout options — lump sum, monthly income, or lump sum + monthly income. Covers 64 critical illnesses with optional rider. Tax benefits under 80C and 10(10D).

name: SBI Bluechip Fund — SIP
description: Large-cap focused equity fund with a 15-year track record of consistent outperformance. Invests in top 100 companies by market cap. Start SIP from ₹500/month. Ideal for conservative equity investors seeking long-term wealth creation.

name: Axis Long Term Equity Fund — ELSS SIP
description: Tax-saving ELSS fund with a 3-year lock-in. Invests in high-conviction mid and large-cap picks. Dual benefit — ₹1.5 lakh tax deduction under 80C and equity market participation. SIP from ₹500/month.

name: Zerodha Demat & Trading Account
description: India's largest discount broker — zero brokerage on equity delivery, flat ₹20/order on intraday and F&O. Advanced charting with Kite, Smallcase integration, Coin for direct MFs, and Varsity for free investing education.

name: Angel One Trading Account
description: Full-service broker with discount pricing — zero brokerage on delivery, ₹20/order on F&O. Smart API for algo trading, ARQ Prime AI-powered recommendations, and integrated mutual fund and IPO application.

name: HDFC Home Loan
description: Home loans starting at 8.50% p.a. with tenure up to 30 years. Flexible EMI options, top-up loan facility, and balance transfer from other lenders. Online application with doorstep document pickup in 48 cities.

name: Max Bupa Health Companion — Health Insurance
description: Comprehensive health insurance with ₹5L to ₹1 Cr cover. Cashless treatment at 6,000+ hospitals, no co-pay, annual health check-ups, and AYUSH treatment cover. Family floater option for up to 6 members.

name: Star Health Family Health Optima — Health Insurance
description: Family floater health plan with ₹5L to ₹25L cover. 14,000+ network hospitals, automatic recharge (Sum Insured restored after a claim in the same year), maternity cover, and no upper age limit for renewal.

name: National Pension System (NPS) — Tier 1
description: Government-backed retirement savings scheme with market-linked returns. Tax benefits under 80CCD(1B) — additional ₹50,000 deduction over 80C. Choose your fund manager and asset allocation (equity, corporate bonds, government securities).

name: Public Provident Fund (PPF) Account
description: India's safest long-term investment — sovereign guarantee, 7.1% p.a. (tax-free), 15-year tenure with partial withdrawal after 7 years. Ideal for risk-averse investors and retirees wanting guaranteed returns with EEE tax status.

name: Bajaj Finance Fixed Deposit
description: Corporate FD offering up to 8.85% p.a. for senior citizens (8.35% for others). AAA/FAAA rated by CRISIL and ICRA. Flexible tenures from 12 to 60 months, monthly interest payout option, and online management.

name: ICICI Lombard Motor Insurance — Comprehensive
description: Comprehensive car insurance with own-damage cover, third-party liability, roadside assistance, and zero depreciation add-on. Cashless claims at 12,000+ garages. Instant online renewal with no inspection needed.

name: Groww Mutual Fund Platform
description: Commission-free direct mutual fund investing. Browse 5,000+ schemes, compare returns, and start SIPs in under 2 minutes. Also offers stocks, FDs, and digital gold on the same app. KYC completion in 10 minutes.

benefits: Stocks + MF + FD in one app

name: Smallcase — Thematic Stock Portfolios
description: Invest in curated baskets of stocks and ETFs built around themes — electric vehicles, digital India, rising rural demand, all-weather investing. Created by SEBI-registered research analysts. Rebalancing alerts included.

name: ET Money Genius — SIP & Tax Optimiser
description: AI-powered mutual fund advisory that recommends tax-efficient SIPs based on your income, age, and goals. Features smart SIP step-up, portfolio health check, and ELSS optimisation. ₹99/month for Genius advice, free for basic.

name: Paytm Money — Stocks & Mutual Funds
description: Integrated investing on India's most-used payments app. Zero brokerage on equity delivery, direct MF investing, instant IPO application via UPI, and digital gold starting at ₹1. Seamless KYC for existing Paytm users.

name: SBI Personal Loan
description: Pre-approved personal loans for SBI salary account holders from 11% p.a. Get up to ₹20 lakh with minimal documentation. Instant disbursement through YONO app. No collateral required, flexible EMI tenure up to 6 years.
